description: Ten fixed prompts used to elicit both human and AI responses. Each prompt is held constant across both conditions. Target response length: 180-220 words.

prompts.text: Explain how to make a cup of tea for someone who has never done it before.
Describe a time management method for a student preparing for exams.
Explain why regular walking can improve general health.
Describe the advantages and disadvantages of working from home.
Explain how a library can help a local community.
Describe the main causes of traffic congestion in a city.
Explain the importance of sleep for mental performance.
Describe how to prepare for a job interview.
Explain why recycling systems often fail in practice.
Describe the benefits and drawbacks of online learning.

notes: Prompts must be finalised and frozen before any samples are collected. Once a prompt text is set, it must not be altered. Domain field is free text — use a consistent taxonomy across all prompts.
